name: 9 METERS BIOPHARM.DL-,001
summary: 9 Meters Biopharma, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company focused on developing novel therapies for gastrointestinal diseases. The company's lead product candidate is designed to treat short bowel syndrome (SBS). 9 Meters Biopharma is headquartered in Raleigh, North Carolina.
